## Experiment

Which experiment is affected? (e.g. `whereami`, `link-shortener`)

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

1. Request / endpoint: `...`
2. Query/body: `...`
3. See error / unexpected behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (error message, status code, response body if relevant).

## Environment

- Wrangler version (if relevant):
- Node version (if relevant):
- Deployed vs local:

## Additional context

Any other details, logs, or screenshots.
